collection: CUL, T-S ; CUL, T-S ; CUL, T-S ; CUL, T-S
description: Part of a booklet of alms lists (fols. 15.5, 15, 39, 50). Date is preserved on fol. 39, Tuesday, Marheshvan 18 (Nov. 5), 1107. Fol. 50 contains the distribution of the following Tuesday [Nov. 12] again comprising 500 pounds, but only 547 loaves. The handwriting is that of Avraham b. Aharon. (Information from Mediterranean Society, II, p. 443, App. B 22).
description_he: חלק מחוברת רשימות צדקה, מתוארך נובמבר 1107, בכתב אברהם בן אהרן
